expectedIssues: Responsible gaming icon is missing from the top nav bar
reportedIssues: Multiple elements are cut off at the right edge of the viewport, including the top category tab row and the third game card column. This makes the page look horizontally overflowing rather than fitting the mobile screen.
The fixed bottom navigation bar overlaps the game grid content near the bottom of the screen, hiding parts of the game cards underneath it.
The 'Hot Games' category label is visibly truncated as 'Hot Ga...' at the right edge of the tab row.
The selected 'Home' tab has an odd gray/blue shadow or smudge along its lower edge, which looks like a rendering artifact.
Game cards in the rightmost column are only partially visible, including cropped artwork and labels, which can make the grid feel broken if this is not intended as a carousel.

expected.reasoning: None of the reported issues describe a missing responsible gaming icon from the top nav bar; they focus on layout overflow, navigation overlap, text truncation, and rendering artifacts.
